//: Dedicated program for React Native-importing integration tests. react-native's ambient globals (e.g. setTimeout returning number) conflict with @types/node's, so these tests cannot share a program with tsconfig.integration.json's host-flavored graph. Extends the base workspace tsconfig purely to inherit its baseUrl + @vibestudio/@workspace path mappings, then overrides lib/types to the RN-safe (node-global-free) shape mirroring apps/mobile/tsconfig.json.
